curation_notes: Patch modifies only math/dec.go (plus tests, changelog, and go.mod). The vulnerability is in the maxDecBitLen constant which was computed as MaxBitLen + decimalTruncateBits (256 + 59 = 315 bits), misaligned with the 256-bit MaxBitLen used for Int types. This allowed Dec values outside the valid Int range. The patch replaces all BitLen-based checks with explicit upper/lower limit comparisons based on 2^256 * 10^18. Locations derived from the patch diff identifying all functions that used the incorrect maxDecBitLen validation; representative subset chosen for the locations array.
